title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development velocity and reduce costs. The plugins extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, model swapping, token spend monitoring, and AI quality filtering, addressing practical workflow bottlenecks.
